summary: Completed frontend testing for Iteration 2 - Brand Identity & Theme Engine. All 6 home page features passed: LogicNodeIcon, BrandWordmark, tagline, and 3 button variants (Primary/Secondary/Ghost). The Secondary button 'Power-On' hover effect (violet→blue with 0.4s transition) works correctly. The /admin route fails due to PostgreSQL not running in the preview environment.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL connection refused (ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432) - Payload CMS admin panel cannot initialize without database
critical.note: This is infrastructure issue - PostgreSQL is not installed/running in preview environment

home_page.logic_node_icon: PASS - SVG renders with data-testid='logic-node-icon', viewBox 0 0 160 160
home_page.brand_wordmark: PASS - data-testid='brand-wordmark' renders with 'ACE' in blue (text-ace-blue) and 'inovations' text
home_page.tagline: PASS - 'Engineering the Next Generation of Digital Platforms' displayed

secondary_button.power_on_effect: VERIFIED - Color transitions from violet to blue on hover

ghost_button.gradient_border: Detected via background-image double-layer technique (linear-gradient 135deg blue to violet)

admin_page.error: Application error: a server-side exception has occurred

features_verified: Home page loads at / with LogicNodeIcon SVG, BrandWordmark, tagline text, and 3 buttons ✅
BrandWordmark renders with 'ACE' in blue and 'inovations' text (data-testid='brand-wordmark') ✅
Primary button 'Open Admin Panel' (data-testid='btn-primary') has dark slate background, links to /admin ✅
Secondary button 'Get Started' (data-testid='btn-secondary') has violet background, transitions to blue on hover (0.4s 'Power-On' effect) ✅
Ghost button 'Learn More' (data-testid='btn-ghost') has gradient border (blue to violet) ✅
/admin route loads Payload CMS admin panel ❌ (PostgreSQL not available)
action_items: PostgreSQL database needs to be installed/configured for /admin route to work
Consider adding graceful error handling when database is unavailable
critical_code_review_comments: All brand components properly implement data-testid attributes for testing
Button variants correctly use Tailwind CSS classes with proper color codes
Ghost button gradient border technique uses correct background-image double-layer approach
Font configuration using next/font/google for Inter and Outfit is properly set up

success_rate.frontend: 86% (6/7 features passed - /admin fails due to missing PostgreSQL)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 Brand Identity testing complete. Home page components (LogicNodeIcon, BrandWordmark, Button variants) all work correctly. The /admin route requires PostgreSQL to be running - this is an infrastructure dependency, not a code issue. Payload CMS admin panel initialization fails without database connection. WebSocket HMR warnings in console are expected in dev mode and not a real issue.
